description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/eyeo/websites/docker:eyeo-python2.7-cms and two stages: build and deploy. In the build stage add a build job that runs npm install, then gulp, then python -m cms.bin.generate_static_pages --version ${CI_COMMIT_SHA:0:8} . public and stores the public directory as an artifact. In the deploy stage add a pages job that depends on build, installs rpl and rename via apt-get, installs crudini with pip, extracts SITEURL from settings.ini, rewrites URLs in the public folder using multiple rpl -Rq commands, renames index files to index.html, and publishes the public directory as the pages artifact. Also in the deploy stage add an upload-artifacts job that runs only on the master@eyeo/websites/help.eyeo.com ref, sets GIT_STRATEGY to none, ensures ssh-agent is available, adds the SSH_PRIVATE_KEY, prepares the ~/.ssh directory, copies the public folder to a directory named by the short commit SHA, creates a tar.gz and its md5 checksum, and scp's both files to gl-help_eyeo_com@eyeofiles.com:/var/www/helpcenter.eyeofiles.com.
